title: Options Income Series - Earn Double-Digit Income (January 2023)
text: We explain why selling cash-covered puts and covered calls are relatively safe choices for earning a high income. We will discuss how to formulate an options income strategy that's sustainable and repeatable.

title: Sector Leaders End Tough Year With Thin Ranks
text: New Year starts with just three top stocks that meet IBD Sector Leaders' stringent criteria: Super Micro Computer, KLA and Catalyst Pharma. The post Sector Leaders End Tough Year With Thin Ranks appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Semiconductor Stocks Brace For Bumpy 2023; Here's Who Can Weather The Storm
text: The semiconductor industry could be in for a rough year in 2023 amid declining sales of memory chips and PC processors. The post Semiconductor Stocks Brace For Bumpy 2023; Here's Who Can Weather The Storm appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Applied Materials Ballyhooed E-Beam Inspection Sector Lost Share To KLA's Optical
text: Applied Materials launched its new E-beam metrology/inspection technology on December 13, 2022. Despite efforts to promote its E-beam technology, Optical technology led by KLA continues to generate greater growth.

title: Wall Street places more bets on chip sector's soft landing in 2023
text: More on Wall Street are betting on a soft landing for semiconductor stocks that lagged the broader market in 2022 as a two-year, pandemic-driven chip shortage suddenly flipped into a glut.

title: Top Stocks: Computer Hardware, Chip Equipment And Biotech Sector Leaders
text: Top stocks KLA, Super Micro Computer and Catalyst Pharmaceuticals are among sector leaders that are holding their ground. The post Top Stocks: Computer Hardware, Chip Equipment And Biotech Sector Leaders appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: KLA Foundation Invests More Than $1 Million in Bay Area and Michigan Nonprofits to Advance Social Equity, Access, and Education
text: Latest domestic grant cycle part of $4 million total global distributions awarded by year end MILPITAS, Calif , Dec. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced the KLA Foundation recently distributed more than $1 million in grants and donations to support social equity, access, and education with an emphasis in science, technology, engineering and math (STEM) in the Bay Area and Southeast Michigan this December. Through its long history of supporting community-level organizations, this is the first time the Foundation has made a single investment of this magnitude and impact.

title: KLA Corp. (KLAC) Grows Portfolio With X-ray Metrology System
text: KLA Corp. (KLAC) introduces the Axion T2000 X-ray metrology system to gain momentum among advanced memory chip manufacturers.

title: KLA Launches Revolutionary X-Ray Metrology System
text: New Axion® T2000 Extends Advanced Metrology Portfolio That Addresses Vertical Scaling Challenges in Memory Chip Manufacturing MILPITAS, Calif. , Dec. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) announced the launch of the revolutionary Axion® T2000 X-ray metrology system for advanced memory chip manufacturers.

title: Mighty Chip Stock KLA Nears Buy Point As Acquisitions Help Power Earnings
text: Chip stock KLA is a sector leader after strong earnings. The stock is in a base with a buy point of 392.60.

title: Stock Market Mixed After Inflation Data As Treasury Yields Dive; These 2 Solar Breakouts Fail
